overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk bar and nightclub with dominant green neon lighting. The player character explores a lounge area with modern furniture, passes by holographic display tanks at the bar, and navigates through narrow steam-filled corridors and stairwells. The environment features cybernetically enhanced characters, glowing signage, and high-tech interior design typical of the Cyberpunk 2077 game engine.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic lounge with green neon ambient lighting. A potted plant sits on a black table in the foreground, while a white modern sofa curves through the center space. A character with red hair stands near wall-mounted screens on the left, and the camera moves slowly forward, taking in the cyberpunk aesthetic of the room.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to reveal more of the lounge, showing characters seated on sofas with a hookah pipe visible. A character with purple hair and a glowing mask sits prominently in the right foreground. The white sofa shifts to the left as the camera advances toward the illuminated bar counter visible in the distance.

The camera passes a pool table on the left and approaches the bar counter, which is now close in the foreground. The environment shifts from carpet to marble flooring as the camera moves toward a corridor entrance at the far end.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow corridor illuminated by cyan neon strips along the floor and walls. A character in yellow sits on an illuminated bench to the left. The environment transitions from the open bar to a confined passageway with vending machines and graffiti-covered walls. The lighting gradually dims as the camera approaches a concrete stairwell at the end of the corridor.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a narrow concrete stairwell bathed in green emergency lighting and filled with thick steam or fog. Metal railings line the stairs as the camera climbs toward a heavy metal door at the top. The environment is dark and atmospheric, with the neon glow of the lower levels replaced by dim green illumination.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the stairwell into an upper-level industrial corridor with metal grating floors and exposed piping on the ceiling. The lighting returns to cyan neon strips along the floor edges. Distant characters are visible walking ahead in the narrow passage, which features a utilitarian cyberpunk aesthetic with visible ductwork and metal surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic lounge that gradually transitions into a high-tech bar area. It begins by gliding past a potted plant and a curving white sofa under green neon lighting, passing a red-haired character standing near wall-mounted screens. As the camera turns right, the view expands to reveal patrons lounging with a hookah and a character wearing a glowing mask before advancing toward a distant, illuminated counter. The scene then shifts from the soft textures of the lounge to the sleek marble flooring of the bar, passing a pool table and cylindrical holographic tanks containing glowing green figures. Finally, the camera approaches the foreground of the bar counter before turning toward a corridor entrance at the far end of the room.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit corridor through a claustrophobic stairwell and into an industrial upper level. It begins by entering a narrow passageway illuminated by cyan neon strips, passing a character in yellow on a glowing bench and vending machines against graffiti-covered walls. As the camera approaches the end of the corridor, the lighting dims and the scene shifts into a concrete stairwell filled with thick steam and bathed in dim green emergency light. The camera then ascends the stairs past metal railings toward a heavy door, before emerging into an upper-level industrial corridor. Finally, the environment opens up to reveal metal grating floors and exposed ceiling piping, with the cyan neon lighting returning to guide the way toward distant figures walking ahead.
